bench_setup.notes: IWDG (Independent Watchdog) test. No external wiring required. Configures IWDG with LSI clock, prescaler /128, reload=999 → ~4s timeout. Firmware feeds watchdog every 1ms and reports PASS with heartbeat. A sustained heartbeat proves: (a) IWDG started without premature reset (LSI functional, PR/RLR correct); (b) reload path works. If IWDG fires the chip resets and mailbox stays at RUNNING — pipeline reports timeout FAIL.
